title: parasenecio vespertilio
intro: Parasenecio vespertilio, also known as the bat's wing or winged ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to China. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Parasenecio vespertilio include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant may be found in the form of decoctions or infusions, often used to promote respiratory health and soothe various ailments.
